name: Green Beans in Olive Oil
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim the green beans and cut them into three pieces.
2. Wash and drain the onions.
3. In a heavy-bottomed pan, combine the chopped onion and tomatoes.
4. Sprinkle salt over the mixture and rub it in lightly with your fingers.
5. Stir in the green beans, olive oil, and sugar, mixing well.
6. Cover the pan and cook for 15 minutes on medium heat, stirring occasionally.
7. The beans will lose their color and soften as moisture is absorbed.
8. When all the moisture has been absorbed, stir-fry the beans for an additional 2 to 3 minutes.
9. Add half a cup of water, cover, and simmer for 40 to 50 minutes until the beans are tender.
10. If necessary, add more water in increments of half a cup until the dish is very moist but not watery.
11. Serve cold as part of a buffet.
